Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Looking at the provided event log sample I can see clear patterns across different cases that suggest a consistent workflow

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The events show a sequential process starting with material retrieval and ending with visual inspection

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: I notice the events naturally cluster into distinct phases based on their activities and resources

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For instance all material handling activities happen at the beginning with Operator A followed by welding with Operator B then coating and drying with specialized units and finally quality checks

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I should group these logically the first few events clearly belong to material preparation since they involve getting the raw material ready

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Then there is a distinct welding phase where the actual fabrication happens

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The coating and drying steps form their own protective treatment phase

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: And finally the quality assurance steps come last

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: For naming I need to use industry relevant terms that accurately describe each phases purpose

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The names should be intuitive so anyone looking at the high level process can immediately understand what each step entails

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The grouping rationale should emphasize both the temporal sequence and the logical flow of the manufacturing process

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Each phase represents a distinct transformation stage of the product from raw material to finished item
